headline: Why Lennox International (LII) Reaffirmed Earnings but Raised Revenue Guidance After Q1 2026 Results
summary: Lennox International recently reported its first-quarter 2026 results, with sales rising to US$1,135.1 million while net income and diluted EPS from continuing operations eased compared with a year earlier. The company also completed a long-running share repurchase program totaling about US$3.32 billion and maintained full-year 2026 earnings guidance while lifting revenue growth expectations to roughly 8%, highlighting confidence in its commercial strength and recent acquisitions. Next,...
